title: Cati Zoom Levels
description: Fixed k-values and extension strategy for zoom steps.

levels.description: Comma-separated k-values (e.g. '0.5, 0.75, 1.25'). Prepended to the zoom sequence; only values >= 0.5 are kept. Duplicates with the extended sequence are ignored.

extend.description: Strategy for extending the sequence from 1.0 up to srcW. halves: 0.5 steps for k < 5, then 1.0 steps. quarters: 0.25 steps for k < 2, then 0.5 steps for k < 5, then 1.0 steps. adaptive: 0.25 steps for k < 2, 0.5 for k < 5, 1.0 for k < 15, 2.0 for k < 32, 4.0 for k < 64, then 8.0 steps.
